mission_title: Parent portal redesign to dashbaord-design + live dashboard metrics
instance_note: Reusing the EXISTING st1 dev namespace rather than allocating a new one: the full stack (api, web, postgres, redis, mailpit, minio, r-scoring) was already up and healthy at intake, and standing up a parallel stack would fork the datastore this mission must persist to. Port probe recorded under 'infra'.

root.note: Plain directory holding three independent git repos + shared docs/ and root .qa/ (Agent D mission st-mvp-d).

api.role: BACKEND — touched only where a design metric needs an aggregate the API cannot already serve

app.role: Electron student client — OUT OF SCOPE for this mission

frontend.framework: Next.js 16.2.10 (App Router, Turbopack, standalone output, reactCompiler: true)
frontend.rendering_model: React Server Components by default; 'use client' on leaves only
frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS v4.3.2, CSS-first @theme in src/app/globals.css, OKLCH tokens
frontend.ui_kit: shadcn 4.13.0 (style: base-nova) built on @base-ui/react 1.6.0 — NOT Radix
frontend.i18n: next-intl 4.13.1, locales en/zh/ko/ms/vi/th, localePrefix 'as-needed', defaultLocale en, 1151 keys per catalog
frontend.animation: tw-animate-css 1.4.0 + Tailwind v4 transitions (NO new animation dependency permitted)
frontend.start_command: pnpm exec next dev -p 3100 — started by Playwright's webServer block; CLAUDE.md law 12 forbids running dev/build/start by hand

backend.data_access: Strapi Document Service — strapi.documents(), documentId (never numeric id), explicit populate
backend.start_command: pnpm develop (in schooltest-api) — already running, kept alive by the watchdog

r_scoring.note: Docker IMAGE, not a restartable process (root .qa OP-16)

neighbors_avoided: 3000 — a neighbouring app; playwright.config.ts already documents this
1025/8025 — a neighbour's mailhog; ours is mailpit on 1125/8125

auth.mechanism: Strapi users-permissions JWT held in localStorage under key 'app.auth.token'
auth.plumbing: src/lib/axios/strapi.ts — readClientToken/writeClientToken, request interceptor sets Authorization: Bearer, 401 interceptor clears the token
auth.cookies: NONE — the JWT is never a cookie and is never read in src/proxy.ts
auth.route_guarding: client-side redirect to /sign-in when there is no token
auth.security_boundary: Strapi users-permissions roles + grants (src/bootstrap/permissions*.ts). Verified live: GET /api/my/students with no token -> 403
auth.test_credentials: Seeded parent — tests/e2e/helpers/auth.ts SEEDED_PARENT (parent@schooltest.local). Other role passwords live in schooltest-api/.env as SEED_ADMIN_PASSWORD / SEED_APIADMIN_PASSWORD / SEED_TEACHER_PASSWORD / SEED_STUDENT_PASSWORD. Never committed here.
auth.account_creation_policy: Accounts come ONLY from the Strapi bootstrap seed / CLI. Never from a signup form, never from the admin UI.

e2e.config: schooltest-web/playwright.config.ts — testDir tests/e2e, baseURL http://localhost:3100, webServer boots next dev and reuses an existing server
helpers: tests/e2e/helpers/i18n.ts (catalog-driven selectors — copy drift fails loud)

package_manager: pnpm (exclusively — npm/yarn/bun forbidden by CLAUDE.md law 6)

design_source.note: Static HTML design export — the inline styles ARE the spec. Plus tokens.css, Google Sans variable fonts, and logo assets. The folder name is misspelled in the repo; kept as-is so @-references resolve.
design_source.tokens: dashbaord-design/tokens.css — shadcn-compatible light + dark token set, brand navy/blue/teal, Google Sans, shadow scale

checks: postgres 127.0.0.1:5540 accepts a real connection — 1542 rows in up_users
POST /api/auth/local with the seeded parent -> 200 + a real 139-char JWT (user id 49, confirmed: true)
GET /api/my/students with that JWT -> 200 + 10 real seeded student rows
GET /api/my/students with NO token -> 403 (auth boundary live)
web http://127.0.0.1:3100/ -> 200; localePrefix 'as-needed' means / IS the en route and /en -> 307 back to /
real data present: 382 students, 2358 results, 2611 sessions, 1570 notifications, 312 schools, 8 agents
